description: Structured error taxonomy for Quantum Mode in Stray Goose

errors.name: Detection False Positive
errors.description: Task was flagged as quantum but was not actually quantum-related
errors.action: exit quantum mode and continue normal handling
errors.prevention: Improve keyword detection with context analysis
examples: Query: 'I have a quantum of solace' (movie reference)

errors.name: Empty Retrieval
errors.description: No relevant dataset examples found for the quantum query
errors.action: block executable generation, escalate explanation-only path if safe
errors.recovery: broaden search, check for typos, suggest similar algorithms
errors.prevention: Expand dataset coverage, improve retrieval algorithm
examples: Query: 'Implement quantum algorithm XYZ' (algorithm not in dataset)
Query: 'Quantum algorithm for protein folding' (advanced topic not covered)

errors.name: Low Confidence Retrieval
errors.description: Examples found but match quality is weak or uncertain
errors.action: consult ProjectX or answer cautiously with disclaimers
errors.recovery: use most relevant example with explicit uncertainty notice
errors.prevention: Improve similarity scoring, add more examples
examples: Query: 'Quantum gates tutorial' (general, many possible examples)

errors.name: Unsupported Framework
errors.description: Requested framework is not currently supported

errors.name: Framework Mismatch
errors.description: Retrieved examples and requested framework don't match
errors.action: re-retrieve using framework filter or translate with notice
errors.recovery: filter examples by framework, translate if possible
examples: Query: 'Bell state in Qiskit' but only PennyLane examples found
Query: 'QFT in PennyLane' but examples are Qiskit-only

errors.name: Invalid Task
errors.description: Required task fields are missing or invalid
errors.action: ask for missing fields or normalize to closest valid task
errors.recovery: prompt for missing information, suggest defaults

errors.name: Import Failure
errors.action: mark execution failed, log environment details
errors.recovery: check framework installation, suggest installation steps

errors.name: Syntax Error
errors.description: Generated or provided code has syntax errors
errors.recovery: syntax check before execution, suggest fixes

errors.name: Simulator Failure
errors.description: Quantum simulator failed to run the circuit/program
errors.action: capture stack/error details, classify, escalate if persistent
errors.recovery: simplify circuit, reduce shots, try different simulator

errors.name: Logic Failure
errors.description: Code runs but fails algorithm-specific assertions
errors.action: treat as incorrect solution, retrieve analogous examples
errors.recovery: debug algorithm logic, check expected vs actual
errors.prevention: Better algorithm understanding, more test cases
examples: Expected Bell state (00:50%, 11:50%) but got different distribution
Deutsch algorithm should output constant but outputs balanced

errors.name: Probabilistic Mismatch
errors.description: Measured distribution deviates from expected probabilistic behavior
errors.action: re-run within tolerance bounds, inspect shot count and assertion settings
errors.recovery: increase shots, adjust tolerance, check random seed
examples: Expected 50/50 distribution but got 45/55 (within statistical noise)

errors.name: Resource Limit Exceeded
errors.recovery: suggest smaller problem size, explain limits
examples: Estimated runtime 5 minutes exceeds 30 second limit

errors.name: ProjectX Block
errors.prevention: Better task formulation, stay within scope

categories.validation: Errors in task validation and parsing

recovery_strategies.retry: Can be retried with same parameters
recovery_strategies.adjust: Can be retried with adjusted parameters

statistics_tracking.error_frequency: Track how often each error occurs
statistics_tracking.category_trends: Track trends in error categories over time
statistics_tracking.learning_impact: Track impact of errors on learning signals

integration.with_projectx: Errors feed into ProjectX safety judgments
integration.with_tracing: Errors are logged in structured traces
